The '''Battle of Saijo''' was the final battle of the [[Nagai–Tof War]] of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Prelude==
An Outer Rim world, [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] was the site of one of the earliest skirmishes between the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] and the [[Alliance of Free Planets]]. By the time the Alliance and the Nagai had joined forces, however, it no longer belonged to either the Nagai or the natives—in the hands of the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]], it became the personal base of operations for their Supreme Commander, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Sereno]]. When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] (recently formed by the Alliance) learned of Sereno's presence on Saijo, they sent an insertion team of [[Bey]], [[Kyle Katarn]], [[Jan Ors]], [[Dash Rendar/Legends|Dash Rendar]], and [[Guri]] to investigate.

Once their intelligence was recovered, a strike team, consisting of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], [[Dani/Legends|Dani]], [[Fenn Shysa]], [[Maggie]], [[Trif (Human)|Trif]], [[Ozrei N'takkilomandrife|Knife]], [[Den Siva]], and several other commandos—including at least one [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]]—was assembled. [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] and [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]] were also part of the mission, placed in command of the fighter squadrons launched from the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Emancipator]]''.

==The battle==
{{Quote|Surrender and tell your subjects to do likewise, in the name of the Nagi and the Alliance of Free Planets!!|A Nagai warrior|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 107">[[Star Wars (1977) 107|''Star Wars'' (1977) 107]]</ref>}}
The strike team picked their way through the wreckage of one of Saijo's wrecked cities, working their way towards the planet's main trade center—now employed by the Tof as a headquarters. Inside waited not only Prince Sereno, but also Dark Lady [[Lumiya]], who had defected to the Tof cause following the [[Battle of Zeltros]]. Knife and Den allowed themselves to be captured by a Tof patrol, and were brought before the Prince. Leia and Dani donned exquisite ball gowns, disguises which allowed them to infiltrate the throne room, and Luke and Han were able to sneak in regardless.

Knife and Den launched their attack, and were soon joined by Leia, Dani, Han and Luke. Sereno's Tof guards were easily dispatched, but Lumiya proved harder to deal with. She incapacitated Knife with a stun blast, before holding Leia at gunpoint.

Meanwhile, Sereno ordered immediate air support to neutralize the attackers. As the ''[[Merriweather]]'' launched a flight of [[Tof starfighter]]s, Lando's squadron pounced, eliminating the Tof fighters before they could make it planetside. Defenseless, the ''Merriweather'' surrendered to the Alliance.

Although Luke was able to capture Sereno, no one could reach Lumiya in time to stop her from shooting Leia. Just as she was about to pull the trigger, though, one of the Tof unexpectedly blasted Lumiya.

==Aftermath==
[[File:Merriweather.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''[[Merriweather]]'' over [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]].]]

With his forces defeated and Lumiya left for dead, Sereno reluctantly ordered a full Tof surrender. The Tof traitor then removed his disguise and revealed himself as [[Bey]], who had been the Alliance's most trusted agent amongst the Tof. And so it was that, with the full, unconditional surrender of the Tof, the Alliance were given their first shot at forging a lasting peace from the remains of war.

After this battle and the conclusion of the war at [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] was now free to focus on its main liberation campaign against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TEA" />
